title: Aftermath

startPoint.en: Talk to Adrasteia in her library on the 1st floor[UK]2nd floor[US] of the White Knights' Castle in Falador, near the interrogation room.
startPoint.es: Habla con Adrasteia en su biblioteca de la 1ª planta[UK]2ª planta[US] del White Knights' Castle en Falador, cerca de la sala de interrogatorios.

children.title: Complete the Eyes in Their Stars mystery

recommended.name: Ring of respawn
recommended.display: Ring of respawn, passage of the abyss, Falador Teleport, activated Falador lodestone, or master archaeologist's outfit for quick access to the White Knights' Castle

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: Archaeology journal or master archaeologist's outfit to teleport to Kharid-et Dig Site

recommended.name: Port Sarim lodestone
recommended.display: Activated Port Sarim lodestone or master archaeologist's outfit to teleport to Armadyl's Tower

kills: Various enemies within the The Zamorakian Undercity (if not already done at least once)
Zamorak, Lord of Chaos (level 14,000) (if not already beaten at least once)

text.en: Talk to Adrasteia in the library on the 2nd floor of White Knights' Castle in Falador.
text.es: Habla con Adrasteia en la biblioteca de la 2ª planta del White Knights' Castle en Falador.

text.en: Enter Senntisten through the ancient door at the Varrock Dig Site.
text.es: Entra en Senntisten a través de la puerta antigua en el Varrock Dig Site.

text.en: Once inside, enter the Zamorakian Undercity by using the nearby pulley lift (a few steps east of the larger-looking pulley used to enter and exit Senntisten).
text.es: Una vez dentro, entra en la Zamorakian Undercity usando el montacargas cercano (unos pasos al este del montacargas más grande que se usa para entrar y salir de Senntisten).

text.en: Talk to Sir Cadian close to the entry.
text.es: Habla con Sir Cadian cerca de la entrada.

text.en: Clear the Zamorakian Undercity on any difficulty.
text.es: Completa la Zamorakian Undercity en cualquier dificultad.

text.en: Players who have already cleared it may skip this step.
text.es: Los jugadores que ya la hayan completado pueden saltarse este paso.

text.en: Talk to Adrasteia in the library on the 2nd floor. She is not in the throne room.
text.es: Habla con Adrasteia en la biblioteca de la 2ª planta. No está en la sala del trono.

text.en: Go to the throne room on the 3rd floor and talk to Saradomin.
text.es: Ve a la sala del trono en la 3ª planta y habla con Saradomin.

text.en: Talk to anyone again to continue the dialogue.
text.es: Habla con cualquiera de nuevo para continuar el diálogo.

text.en: Travel to the Kharid-et Dig Site and talk to Dr Nabanik.
text.es: Viaja al Kharid-et Dig Site y habla con Dr Nabanik.

text.en: Talk to Nex, Trindine, Wahisietel, or Azzanadra.
text.es: Habla con Nex, Trindine, Wahisietel o Azzanadra.

text.en: Talk to Armadyl in his tower south of Falador.
text.es: Habla con Armadyl en su torre al sur de Falador.

text.en: Talk to Adrasteia in the library on the 2nd floor, not the one in the throne room.
text.es: Habla con Adrasteia en la biblioteca de la 2ª planta, no con la que está en la sala del trono.
